message:
style(engine): apply rustfmt formatting across 10 source and test modules

Applies consistent rustfmt formatting to recently-added modules,
addressing line-length violations and improving readability of method
chains, assert macros, and import ordering.

Source modules reformatted:
- lib.rs: alphabetize pub mod declarations (semantic_contract_baseline
  before semantic_twin)
- semantic_contract_baseline.rs: wrap long const assignment, reformat
  method chains in entry() and blocking_debt_count(), adjust string
  literal line breaks in debt descriptions
- semantic_twin_state_space.rs: wrap long if-conditions across multiple
  lines, reformat method chains in upsert_value() and
  deterministic_digest(), break long boolean conditions in validate()
- test_logging_schema.rs: reformat nested assert! macros with closure
  predicates to standard multi-line style
- unit_test_taxonomy.rs: break long collect() chain in field_set
  construction, reformat expect_err() chain

Test modules reformatted:
- frx_cross_version_compatibility_matrix.rs: wrap long include_str!
  path, reformat collect() chain
- frx_test_logging_schema.rs: reorder imports alphabetically, reformat
  nested assert! predicates to standard multi-line style
- frx_unit_test_taxonomy.rs: reformat collect() chain in lane coverage
- frx_unit_test_taxonomy_contract.rs: reorder imports, reformat
  assert_eq! with inline comments, wrap long union().collect() chain
- local_semantic_atlas_integration.rs: wrap long assert_eq! calls for
  generated_by, primary_bead, and failure_policy fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
